textByHash.da49ea93c788598ee9634f5892640644520689ab: You beat me. What you want?
textByHash.a7bb33319c03bb61a013433bbf0dca1ef42e906e: It long way away. Me not know where. High priest who come before me, he say that when goblins die we go to Yu'biusk. Perhaps he know where it is.
textByHash.2e3f7897eb7b84de5c99d53c4f2ef5e2f1c8b6df: You not goblin. Not high priest. So me attack.
textByHash.703b825ae159b86ddb4519d42fcbd52f37a6c2dd: It dark. Very dark. And cold.
